name: Eleanor, the Sleepy Sniper
description:
Eleanor is a Gun Gale Online player from North America, she's one of the players lucky enough to have an ArFA-Sys companion. Her story is meant to be entirely separate from the Death Gun incident alongside any events that took place on the Japanese GGO server. In real life, she's works the evening shift in a telecommunications office, meaning most of her time in GGO is at night, usually midnight onwards and she sleeps during the daylight hours. She's currently preparing for this year's Bullet of Bullet's tournament, but is hoping to find a companion that she can temporarily side with during the tournament this year. Will you help her reach her goal, or or will you cheer her on from the side?

I did my best to give her game accurate stats, and referenced her skills and gadgets directly to the ones in Fatal Bullet. If you have any suggestions or think I should tweak some things, feel free to leave a comment!

Ported from Yodayo
creator: HSD Absol
